creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
why these cities are perfect in the summertime👇

🇭🇺 Budapest:
Even though inflation has hit Hungary hard, it’s still an affordable destination compared to Western Europe. Budapest is also one of Europe’s most beautiful capital cities, with so many cool bars and restaurants all over town. It’s literally the perfect city for a weekend getaway.

🇩🇰 Copenhagen: 
Like the bears, the bats, and the fat-tailed dwarf lemurs, the Danes hibernate from October to April when it’s dark, rainy, and horrible. That means we’ve got so much pent-up energy when summer comes - and the city explodes with open-air music festivals, food markets and other exciting events daily. 

🇩🇪Berlin:
A bit like Copenhagen, Berlin winters are not for beginners. Berlin summers, however, can be magical. I think Berlin is best experienced on foot, but it’s such a massive city, so walking around the historic streets in the rain (or snow) isn’t fun. Berlin is also pretty cheap compared to other EU capitals, which is always nice in this day and age…

Which European cities are your favourite summer destinations?
